svg.title: How MMR works vs similarity search
svg.desc: Two side-by-side vector spaces showing how plain similarity search returns three clustered results near the query, while MMR returns one close result and two diverse results from different regions of the vector space.

g.text: MMR score = λ · sim(doc, query) − (1 − λ) · max sim(doc, selected)
λ = lambda_mult: 0 → max diversity 1 → max relevance
